programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas comes out of his coma, but his troubles are far from over as Colonel Ki's vengeful brother is still at large.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: I Could Kill My Wife's Lawyer: Classic US detective drama. Theo sets out to prove that a detective's wife's sleazy divorce lawyer is responsible for an arson attack on a boat.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Drama series about suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint tries to stop a crime ring forming a deadly alliance with psychology students who plan murders.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Answers to the Name of Watson: Classic drama. Ken is surprised when a couple staying at the Grand Hotel ask him to recover their stolen cat - and horrified by the cat being a lion.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The first Sin City Slugfest continues as the remaining bots go head-to-head for a chance to reach the Golden Bolt tournament.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. In a weird reversal of their usual roles, Higgins becomes irresponsible while Thomas adopts a more mature image with a blazer.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo agonises over accepting an offer from a leading law firm when a series of drug-related deaths overshadows his decision-making.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave troubleshooter Simon Templar investigates another case. The Saint rescues a Russian damsel in distress and agrees to help her fend off some art thieves.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. Child-minding is not Ken's idea of a glamorous job, and especially so when the child is the difficult son of a fading rock star.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan tries to help the son of an old friend when the boy is implicated in a brutal assault.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur keeps acquiring items that won't do his reputation any good, but how is he going to offload them when he's been conned.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Show
programme.desc: Hosting the World Cup doesn't just change a tournament - it changes a nation. A look at that shift through four hosts at different moments of identity.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Show
programme.desc: Asia Ascending - four nations shaped by structure, ambition and belief, each aiming to redefine where the continent stands in the modern game.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Motul Hungarian Round as the 4.075km track at the Balaton Park Circuit pushes the riders to their limits.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Carey Lowell, 1989. 007 resigns from MI6 and pursues a mission of revenge when an old ally of his is savaged by a notorious drug dealer.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Carey Lowell, 1989. 007 resigns from MI6 and pursues a mission of revenge when an old ally of his is savaged by a notorious drug dealer.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. A new arrival on site takes the guys out for a night of country and western music, and the lads go on strike to protest Ally's treatment of Dennis.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order off the A2.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series. The Protectors are hired by the West German government to find the operator of a Nazi pension fund for five ex-Nazis wanted for war crimes.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. In a weird reversal of their usual roles, Higgins becomes irresponsible while Thomas adopts a more mature image with a blazer.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo agonises over accepting an offer from a leading law firm when a series of drug-related deaths overshadows his decision-making.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave troubleshooter Simon Templar investigates another case. The Saint rescues a Russian damsel in distress and agrees to help her fend off some art thieves.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. Child-minding is not Ken's idea of a glamorous job, and especially so when the child is the difficult son of a fading rock star.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan tries to help the son of an old friend when the boy is implicated in a brutal assault.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The quest this time is to beat Desperado champion Lock-Jaw, but eight bots must first fight to the death in the second Sin City Slugfest.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live coverage of racing from Chester on the Opening Day of the May meeting.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series. The Protectors are hired by the West German government to find the operator of a Nazi pension fund for five ex-Nazis wanted for war crimes.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur receives a couple of interesting propositions while attending Charlie Johnson's funeral.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series. Mike and Frank go head to head when they search a jam-packed barn and 26 underground rooms for objects with the loser having to clean the van.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are in Stafford with a stall full of bikes and trinkets they've picked up in Hereford and Whitstable to see how much they can make.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got a more important matter on his mind.
